narrative:
Bearfield Township has 1,006 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
